source_files.note: All CLI flags implemented (-F/-R/-d/-t/-l/-I/-D/-U/-P/-s/-G/-E/-W/-L). 1 permanent non-claim: POSIX signal handlers (SIGINT/SIGPIPE — handled via write error).
Header file — concepts distributed across Rust modules
AC_DEFUN nested-define arg forwarding: CROSS.38 recursive forloop FIXED via recursion_depth increment in ifelse/ifdef. Same-pass changequote re-lex added (M4.QUOTE.DEEP.1).
Safe Rust: stack probe + thread::Builder. SIGSEGV handler is permanent non-claim (CROSS.20).
